shared.description: You fought long and hard to protect Zorbak's legion of baby dracoliches, and now you can have one of them as a pet!

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Approaches target and bites it for 1 hit of 100% Melee Darkness damage. (Rate: 50%)

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Approaches target and breathes dark flames at it for 3 hits of 50% Magic Darkness damage, amounting to 150% damage. (Rate: 50%) DF AQW

shared.notes:
Pets apply the global CHA damage buff per hit instead of per turn, increasing their damage by [(Player's CHA)/10] per hit, rounded down.
Pets are animated; they move their tails, wings, heads, and other parts of their bodies periodically.

name: Ancestral Boar Spirit
description: This pet has been granted to the ninjas of the Shadow of the Wind Clan by Nago, the boar god. It represents a fierce nature, strong spirit and breath as fresh as a summer ham.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Runs up and rams its head into the enemy for one hit of 100% Melee Bacon damage

name: Ancestral Snake Spirit
description: This spiritual serpent has been granted to members of the Shadow of the Wind Clan. It represents the ability to free yourself from any situation, as a snake escapes its own skin.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Flies up to the enemy and breaths fire out of its mouth for 1 hit of Melee Wind damage

name: Ancient Ninja Terrapin
description: This pet requires a Dragon Amulet. This rare fresh water turtle has, through some magical accident been transformed into an elderly fighting machine, with a bad attitude. He's old enough to know a snap kick from a snapping turtle.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Runs to the enemy, unsheathes two blades and hits for one hit of 100% Melee Nature damage

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Runs to the enemy, unsheathes a star and throws it at the enemy for one hit of 100% Melee Nature damage

attacks.name: Attack Type 3
attacks.description: Runs to the enemy, unsheathes a whip and strikes it at the enemy for one hit of 100% Melee Nature damage

attacks.name: Attack Type 4
attacks.description: Runs to the enemy and kicks them for one hit of 100% Melee Nature damage

shared.description: You have had this baby chickencow since it was just an egg. It is ready to defend you in its brand new armor, but only because it thinks you are its mother.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Hovers and casts a shield, applying 'Chickcalf's Aegis' (+15 Dodge Defense) to player for 4 turns.

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Runs toward target and jumps into it, hovering afterwards for 1 hit of 100% Magic Bacon damage. DF MQ AQW

shared.notes:
Pets will only use Attack Type 1 whenever the player is not affected by 'Chickcalf's Aegis'.
Pets were initially automatically upgraded to the highest level a player could use; this level-to-upgrade model was retired on  September 10th, 2012, in favor of the merge-to-upgrade model.
Pets were DC-tagged on January 9th, 2021.
Pets are animated; they blink, look upwards, preen, and peck at the ground sporadically.

obtainVariants.location: Redeem the code received from purchasing the ChickenCow T-Shirt from  HeroMart

name: Atgasedd Doll
description: Are you feeling it? Buffs you and debuffs enemies, scaling a small amount off of your CHA stat.

obtainMethods.requiredItems: 1  Condensed C Blob & 1  Glob of Unigedd

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a red glow, applying 'Atgasedd' (+X% Boost) to player for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a yellow glow, applying 'Atgno' (+2X Bonus) to player for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Attack Type 3
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a blue glow for 1 hit of 100% Melee Fear damage; applies 'Bradychwyd' (-2X Bonus) to target for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Attack Type 4
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a green glow for 1 hit of 100% Melee Fear damage; applies 'Mwrn' (-X% Boost) to target for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Attack Type 5
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a purple glow, applying 'Unigedd' (+X Block/Parry/Dodge Defense) to player for 2 turns.

notes:
X is equal to [5 + (Player's CHA)/40], rounded up.
Atgasedd Doll's damage is affected by the global CHA damage buff, increasing its damage by [(Player's CHA)/10], rounded down.
Atgasedd Doll's attack rotation always follows and repeats the above cycle; re-equipping Atgasedd Doll will not reset its rotation.

name: Babmuu
description: This strange creature seems to be made of living stone. It has a thick rocky hide that protects it from all but the most extreme conditions and fires streams of compressed dirt from its eyes as an attack!

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Approaches target and fires streams of compressed dirt from its eyes for 1 hit of 100% Melee Stone damage. (Rate: 50%)

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Approaches target and headbutts it for 1 hit of 100% Melee Fire damage. (Rate: 50%)

name: Baby Chimera
description: This tiny, adorable, legendary beast hatched from your mysterious egg! It deals damage that scales with your level, and provides a shield that scales with your level! Proof of your victory over the Otherworldly Creatures Challenge board.
damage:
Scaled, rounded up
Min: [(Player's level)*2/5 - 10], bounded below 1
Max: [(Player's level)*2/5 + 10]

obtainMethods.requiredItems: 1  Chunk of Void Radiance & 1  Core-Strapped Egg

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Crouches in place, applying 'Chimeric Defense' (+X Block/Parry/Dodge Defense) to player for 3 turns, where X is equal to [(Player's level) + (Player's CHA)/4], rounded up.

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Approaches target, claws at it, and whips it for 3 hits of 100% Melee Nature damage, amounting to 300% damage. (Rate: 80%)

attacks.name: Attack Type 3
attacks.description: Approaches target and breathes fireballs at it for 4 hits of 100% Melee Fire damage, amounting to 400% damage; applies 'Tiny Fireworks', a 75% Magic Fire DoT effect, to target for 3 turns. (Rate: 20%)

notes:
Attack Type 1 will only be used on the first turn of battle, and again every 16 turns thereafter.
Pet is animated; its head and front paw move slightly, while its snake tail writhes and hisses continuously.

shared.description: You fought long and hard to protect Zorbak's legion of baby dracoliches, and now you can have one of them as a pet!

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Approaches target and bites it for 1 hit of 100% Melee Darkness damage. DF MQ AQW Epic

shared.notes:
Pets have an extremely low (<1%) drop rate.
Pets are animated; they move their tails, wings, heads, and other parts of their bodies periodically.

shared.description: You didn't know the kraken in "The Dragons Secret" was a mommy kraken, DID YOU?

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Runs to the enemy and breathes bubbles at the enemy for 1 hit of melee damage DF MQ AQW Epic

shared.notes:
The following changes were implemented on December 23rd, 2018:
  • Pets initially had a sellback value of 50 Gold, before being DC tagged and becoming unsellable.
  • Pets cannot be destroyed.

obtainVariants.location: Redeem the code received from purchasing  The Dragon's Secret from  HeroMart
Redeem the code received from purchasing  The Dragon's Secret from  HeroMart
Redeem the code received from purchasing  The Dragon's Secret from  HeroMart
Redeem the code received from purchasing  The Dragon's Secret from  HeroMart
Redeem the code received from purchasing  The Dragon's Secret from  HeroMart
Redeem the code received from purchasing  The Dragon's Secret from  HeroMart

name: Baby Splashy
description: This rare creature is found only in the purest natural spring water on Lore. If raised properly it could turn out to be your best friend. If raised poorly it might eat your horse if you say the wrong thing to it.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Approaches target and bites it for 1 hit of 100% Melee Water damage. (Rate: 50%)

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Approaches target and strikes with its tongue for 2 hits of 100% Melee Water damage, amounting to 200% damage. (Rate: 50%)

shared.description: This baby ChaosWeaver took a liking to you when you saved it's life during the RavenLoss war. It would like to travel with you and help you on your journey.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Approaches and blasts target for 1 hit of 120% Melee Darkness damage. (Rate: 98%)

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Approaches and slashes target with its kamas for 1 hit of 100% Melee Darkness damage; applies 'Poison Strike!', a 100% Magic Poison DoT effect, to target for 5 turns. (Rate: 2%) AQW

shared.description: You want to hug it and squeeze it and call it Herbert.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: The pet walks up to your enemy and its coxcomb pops for 1 hit of 100% Magic damage DF MQ AQW Epic

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Scratches the opponent two times for 2 hits of melee Light damage

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Scratches the opponent four times for 4 hits of melee Light damage

name: Battle Piggy
description: This little fellow looks cute and chubby, but he's been trained in several pig-based fighting styles.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Runs forward, jump into air and lands backside first on the enemy for one hit of 100% Melee Nature damage

name: Bitty Squishie
description: Looks like something tagged along when the shrink-ray wore off!

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Charges through the enemy for one hit of 100-110% Magic Nature damage

name: Black Ice Pwny
description: This pet was given to you by a moglin in Frostvale who you saved from a terrible fate. (Requires Dragon Amulet).

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Charges into the enemy with its horn and rams into it for one hit of 100% Melee Ice damage

notes:
Transformed from  Large Dragon Gift Box on  January 1st, 2007.
Alternative Image

name: Blueberry Ghost-Tog
description: Boo! You used the blueberry power pellet to beat the Ghost-Tog and tame its little sibling. Now Blueberry will serve you faithfully!

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Ghost-Tog walks up and jumps to bite the enemy for one hit of 100% Melee Fire damage

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Ghost-Tog walks up and spits out green liquid for one hit of 100% Melee Curse damage

name: Bonehead
description: This special baby dracolich is here to stay! He has a chance to heal you with the legendary power of turkeys stuffed into small places. Requires a Dragon Amulet to use.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Approaches target and bites it for 1 hit of 100% Melee Darkness damage. (Rate: 70%)

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Recovers 5% of player's max HP; approaches target and breathes dark flames at it for 3 hits of 100% Melee Darkness damage, amounting to 300% damage; applies 'Darkness Breath' (-10 Bonus) to target for 1 turn. (Rate: 30%)

notes: Pet is animated; it moves its tail, wings, head, and other parts of its body periodically.

name: Boo Boo Bear Cub
description: It's so sweet and cuddly and totally not a #1 threat!

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Walks over to the enemy and bashes its head to the enemy for one hit of 100% Melee Nature damage

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Pulls a bone out of the ground and buffs you with "Bone to Pick!", raising your Crit by 3 for 2 turns

name: Boxzar
description: The players came together and won the Zard Frenzy Challenge! For totally destroying 5 MILLION zards in LESS the a week enjoy this Boxzar!This item requires a Dragon Amulet.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Jumps up, does a belly flop, and hits the enemy with its box for one hit of 100% Melee damage.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Scratches the enemy for 2 hits of melee Silver damage

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Scratches the enemy for 4 hits of melee Silver damage

shared.description: This...creature?... comes from parts unknown. Grams found a box of these things on her doorstep and after training them... found them too odd to deal wth so she gave them to Cysero. Blak5!

attacks.name: Attack Type 1 /  1.1
attacks.description: Bounces toward target, sending multiple pulses toward it for 2 hits of 100%* Melee ??? damage, amounting to 200%* damage. (Rate: 65%)

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Bounces toward target, sending a pulse toward it for 1 hit of 100% Melee ??? damage. (Rate: 30%)

attacks.name: Attack Type 3 /  3.1
attacks.description: Bounces toward target, hovers mid-air, and blasts it with multiple beams for 5 hits of 100% Melee ??? damage, amounting to 500% damage. (Rate: 5%) DF MQ AQW Epic

shared.notes:
*Each time Braydenball pets perform Attack Type 2 or 3, they increase their max damage value for Attack Type 1 by 10, capping at 250; once Attack Type 1 is performed, the max damage value is reset.
Braydenball pets previously had a different mechanic:
  • Each time a Braydenball pet performed its idle bounce animation, it could increase its max damage value for Attack Type 1, capping only at the global damage cap of SQRT(Pet's level)*100.
  • Upon its discovery, this mechanic was deemed overpowered, and thus the mechanic was changed in August 2019; rates of each attack type occurring were also adjusted.
Pets are animated; they bounce up and down in place.

name: Brigadier General Butterbomb
description: This pet requires the power of a Dragon Amulet. Brigadier General Butterbomb the battle turkey was trained by Dr. Voltabolt to be the worlds most deadly turkey and pilot.

obtainMethods.requiredItems: 30  Corn Kernel & 4  Turkey Tail Feather OR 1  Colonel Butterbomb & 5  Corn Kernel

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Approaches target and pecks it for 1 hit of 100% Melee Nature damage. (Rate: 80%)

attacks.name: Attack Type 2 /  2.1 /  2.2
attacks.description: Fires a corn on the cob at target for 1 hit of 100% Melee Nature damage, with +200 Crit. (Rate: 20%)

name: Bright Fireflies
description: These fireflies from the Creatioux Grove have taken a liking to you. It looks like you've found some new pets, and their presence can buff you!

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Explodes with a circle around you (Heal Resistant -20 for 3 turns)

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Floats up to the enemy and forms a triangle with a sign inside and explodes for one hit of 100% Melee Light damage

name: Brightwing
description: As you rested in a clearing, a butterfly floated down and landed on your hand. You made a Tame Pet roll and scored a critical success. Brightwing is yours!

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Approaches target and bursts into five smaller butterflies, striking target for 1 hit of 100% Melee Light damage.

notes: Pet is animated; it hovers up and down in place, while rapidly fluttering its wings continuously.
